title: eleocharis moorei
intro: Eleocharis moorei, also known as the Australian saw-sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis moorei include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Eleocharis moorei can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
